title: Hattie and the Wizard's Clover Show
summary: In her cozy workshop, Hattie the Mouse discovers two sparkling green clover stickers. Her day takes an exciting turn when she receives a formal invitation to a grand performance at Peacock the Wizard’s castle. Traveling through the forest and over the hills, Hattie joins her friends Mischief Mouse, Mistress Mouse, Lily Mouse, and Jasper for a night of wonder. The show features talented kiddos who enchant the audience with songs like 'Baby Beluga' and high-energy dances in colorful costumes with wings. After a magical evening at the castle, Hattie returns home to drift off to sleep.

highlightQuote.text: No. They don't have feet. They like to go on paper.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I guess this is my new sitting space.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see, but be careful not to sit on the lion's head.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Start.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: (Playful noises and humming)

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A clover. A happy clover with a...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, so you've got to sit the blue timer for our Stars and Stories tonight.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who should tonight's story be about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A clover and another clover.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A clover? And another clover? Who's talking in this story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Another clover and another clover.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Well, it looks like maybe our story is gonna be about Hattie the Mouse?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No! It's not! It's going to be about... two clovers!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what are the clovers' names?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They are just clovers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And where do they live?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, they are sticker clovers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They are stickers. And are they gonna go on an adventure?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. They don't have feet. They like to go on paper.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The clovers like to go on paper. Who's gonna stick them on the paper?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Hattie Mouse found two sparkly green clover stickers. And what did she do with them?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She put them on paper.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She tried to play.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She tried to play. Did she put anything else on the paper?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep, she did.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, maybe she was making a letter to mail to someone. Who was she mailing it to?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: (Singing about Hattie Mouse and a letter)

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You are standing on your tail!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah, look.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: (Singing Jingle Bells)

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hey, maybe we can make up a song about Stars and Stories? Do you want to try doing that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Stars and stories, stars and stories, stars and stars and stories...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Hattie Mouse was in her workshop—

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no. The clover story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, two clover stickers were on a piece of paper in Hattie the Mouse's workshop. And they happened to be on the piece of paper along with a message. And the message said: Dear Hattie the Mouse, this is your official invitation to the big show at the castle of Peacock the Wizard.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The show is happening later today and you're invited to come and watch. Sincerely, Peacock the Wizard. And Hattie Mouse read the message and what did she do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She go'd to the Wizard castle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So Hattie the Mouse closed up her workshop for the day and walked out into the forest and along the path and up the hill to Peacock the Wizard's castle. Who did she sit with?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She sitted in the front. With Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And was anybody else there to watch the show with her?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep. Mistress Mouse, Lily Mouse, and Jasper.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then all of a sudden, the crowd went quiet and the lights came on the stage and who came out to start the show?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: First, the person that talked.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The person that talked. And then a group of animals came out. What kind of animal were they?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They were kiddos.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what were they singing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, first they were singing... Baby Beluga in the deep blue sea, swim so wild and swim so free...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They clapped a lot for the song. And then it was time for dancing. Who came out to dance?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: All the other kiddos.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what were they wearing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They were wearing costumes with wings and funny shoes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they danced all around to the drums and what else?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And a piano player.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Wizard Peacock herself came out and said, 'Thank you everyone for coming to my show.' And so Hattie the Mouse went back home and went to sleep. The end.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: (Laughs)

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Naoie, naoie, naoie!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, and now we turn off.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Peacock the Wizard
characters.description: Once a deep-ocean companion to Seeker, this vibrant bird wizard now serves as the charismatic host of the magical castle’s grand show. From a cozy nest atop a soaring tower, they orchestrate wonder through balloon school arts—transmuting rubber into succulent strawberries—while proudly sporting a magnificent hat gifted by Hattie and Izzy. A playful visionary of dreamer magic and a tireless seeker of rare diamond-shaped potions, they use their stage to beckon heroes into a world of soaring imagination, often dispatching them on whimsical quests to recover enchanted new hats for their growing collection.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Mistress Mouse
characters.description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

characters.name: Lily Mouse
characters.description: Another mouse friend attending the Wizard's performance.

characters.name: Jasper
characters.description: A mouse friend who joins the group to watch the show.

characters.name: The Kiddos
characters.description: A group of performers who sing and dance in colorful costumes and wings.

places.name: Hattie's Workshop
places.description: Tucked within the cozy hollow of a weathered tree, Hattie Mouse’s dwelling serves as a busy, imaginative atelier and social hub where the air hums with the rhythmic snip of scissors. Here, amidst a cheerful clutter of measuring tapes, wet pigments, and scavenged shells, she crafts her signature starry hats from an eclectic mix of fur and feathers. The workshop is bathed in the earthy radiance of her fungal store—a brilliant collection of red, orange, and yellow mushrooms—illuminating the haunting indigo witch painting where Hattie first encountered the squeaking worm. It is in this storied corner, beneath the witch's gaze, that she recently unearthed a mysterious message hidden alongside a cache of sparkly green clover stickers.

places.name: Peacock the Wizard's Castle
places.description: Perched atop a verdant hill, this grand castle serves as a magical sanctuary and the storied venue for the realm’s most spectacular shows. Beyond its formidable gate, the warmth of the kitchen and the echoing splendor of the feast hall provide a staging ground for imaginative quests, while a winding spiral staircase beckons the brave upward toward the spotlight of the wonders that await.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.
